channel.title: Hayes Auto Works, Neighborhood Notes
channel.description: Honest, seasonal car care tips from a two bay shop on Warren Ave in East Dearborn.

item.title: Winter prep that actually saves you a no start
item.description: Cold kills a weak battery fast. A two minute load test now beats a dead car in the driveway in January. We also set tire pressure to the door placard and check your antifreeze mix.

item.title: Why we never guess on a check engine light
item.description: We pull stored and pending codes, verify with a live data check, then confirm the root cause before we quote a single part. The diagnostic fee applies toward the repair when you approve the work.

item.title: Free inspections for single mothers, twice a year
item.description: Two times a year we set aside a Saturday for free multi point inspections, our small way of thanking the neighborhood that built this shop since 1998.

item.title: What a 12 month, 12,000 mile warranty really means
item.description: If a repair we performed fails inside that window, you pay nothing. Reputation is earned one honest repair at a time, and that promise is how we keep our regulars.
